description: Joget is used as a "Swiss Army Knife" which means that all Non-ERP apps we develop are based on it. We have not get disappointed and the our "Solutions range" is getting bigger and bigger allowing us to provide quick professional solutions to the Business.
author: Jenő B.
pros: It is easy to use and has many built-in tools. The support is available and provides fast responses.
cons: Beside the human inducated workflows, it would be nice to have event triggered ones as well.

review_title: Easy to get started and grow with the product
description: The Joget/Mokxa partnership is tight and has helped us succeed over the three years we have been relying on this software. Updating workflows is trivial! Can literally change verbiage or other properties of any step in the process on the fly (5 minutes) and have the changes go live instantly.
author: Patrick C.
pros: Endless possibilities limited only by an organization's desire to explore. This open source software requires very little technical knowledge to get started. Many options to host internally or externally. Cheap hosting option includes some support.
cons: Web based workflow steps do not support going backwards (only moving forwards). It can be done, but is more difficulty than it is worth to implement backwards step function.

author: Yahya A.
pros: Flexible platform , the boundaries is beyond workflow only. you can use it to build apps, dashboards and workflows. The UI is simple for non-technical users, yet you will need some technical skills to build an app. The support responses are fast.
cons: - User access permission level is limited - Using old version of XPDL , which suffers from many limitations unlike BPMN2 - Performance effected when building big size application that has many tools and scripts - Development guide is too basic with simple information, need a better documentation for better illustration. - Database storing limitation, joget stores everything as a string !! - Bad mobile add layout

review_title: Joget solves our pain in application development
description: We have been using Joget Workflow since its very first version until now. From an average tool, it has now improvised into a near prefect rapid application development platform for a solution company like us. With Joget, we manage to churn out a prototype or demo for a system within days, sometimes in hours. Being a low-code platform, application development can be done with minimal coding, at times zero coding. It's plugin architecture provides us the flexibility to extends its features and integrate to various systems with ease. The support we get from Joget was superb and most importantly they listen, understand and help us in solving our problem. Thank you.
author: Mun Fatt L.
pros: Easy and quick application development with its process builder, form builder, datalist builder and userview builder
cons: User access level management can be made simpler

review_title: Easy of use application development tool
author: Peter N.
pros: There are several element you can use on forms. You can quickly develop an application, or workflow. The low code development environment does not limit the flexibility. All the data stored in database tables. Thanks to SQL based data storage, easy to integrate 3rd party systems.
cons: Would be handy more themes with latest version.

review_title: for what it's worth, this technology makes life for internal IT developers very easy.
description: as opposed to acquiring different essential software (eg. HR software,Payroll etc), all we did was get this BPM, now we can have as many different software whenever required.
author: Emmanuel A.
pros: among several other reasons i like that; -It is modestly priced. -It allows customization to a great extent. -Makes the design of rather complex process seem easy to do. -Facilitates Rapid application development
cons: i don't like that fact that such good BPM hasn't been enhanced more rapidly. if adequate attentions is given to improve upon its overall features and capabilities and ease of use, it could become a real game changer in the software development world.

author: lionel T.
pros: Joget is on open software and then we could customize easily it
cons: There is no major issue. Except it is difficult to understand how we can easily deploy our customised applications.

description: The Sky is the limit. After you are comfortable using the platform you can build a simple app in 2 hours.
author: Carlos C.
pros: Joget and the Joget Support Team continue to amaze me, my Directors and Executives. We are delivering amazing apps is so short timeframe and with high quality.
cons: So far so Perfect! No Cons at all. If you don't know how to do something, Joget Support will help you.

description: It's really easy to use Joget to implement the workflow applications. The UI is simple and user-friendly enough for non-technical user. Also, the license price is not high and it's value for money to have Joget Workflow. But, the development guide/sample posted in Joget Community is not enough. It's better to have more details/samples for complicated features.
author: Lisa T.

review_title: Joget Workflow help our business process
description: We use Joget developed Helium order management system to help user submit and maintain orders. There are 7 countries included for now and will be about 13 countries. Different countries have different needs, however, with help of Joget, these functions are relatively simple to implement and achieved the main business process. There is a few aspect to be improved, for example, chart. I also noticed the new version V6 have some improvements in this feature. We are looking forward for it.
author: Chao M.
pros: Process design is easy to implement

review_title: Good promise, but needs to be more scalable/performant
description: Overall the tool is very good and we've been able to customize it to a very large extent. Given that our tool required a lot of customization and changes, required support and plugins/apps were provided as needed. If only the tool could be more scalable, it would help us take this partnership a long way forward.
author: Alok K.

review_title: It was easy to use especially for smaller less involved processes.
description: We could quickly replace a number of smaller manual processes with Joget solutions that lead to us saving much time and improved our accuracy relating to these greatly.
author: Johannes Christiaan V.
pros: Intuitive and easy to use whilst creating the processes. Users also found it easy to adapt to using this software making training quick and easy.
cons: As soon as we started looking at large complex processes we started running into difficulty maintaining the interaction of various sub-systems in these processes. Integration into some of our other databases and systems was also critical and joget's ability to easily allow integration and debugging of this integration caused us a lot of headache. Resources relating to this was also sparse.

description: We are pushing some of the admin work stream out to our trade staff using barcoders and voice commands to eliminate key strokes.
author: Gavin C.
pros: It is definately able to be customised to suit the application we are wanting.
cons: It a new way of thinking about our work processes and workflow.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It is an easy-to-use workflow engine. Perfect choice for the small-medium companies
author: Michael Y.
pros: The flow design interface is easy to use. The binding of the data source and controls are quite easy to set up
cons: The CSS and the theme customization are not flexible. There are method provided by the Joget to interface with other systems, but the effort of the customization will over the price of Joget itself. And the mobile support still has room to improve.

description: I love the product but I wouldn't say its easy to use. The tutorials don't really show you how to do anything but just explain what something does. I had to spend allot of time trying to figure out how things link together. Over all it is still worth it and great to use once you figure it out.
author: Michael T.
pros: creates the general process for you giving you a starting point
cons: very difficult to figure out how things work together

description: We has been using Joget Workflow since late 2015 as collaboration tools with world wide customers & vendors. The average time taken for a project implementation is 1.5 months which is super fast with very less programming skills required. Maintenance & Support is an absolute breeze with JW process monitoring tool provide great visibility & inside of each running process.
author: Elaine T.

description: This software is truly exceptional in it's simplicity, feature set, ways of using plugins and extensions and continuous deployment. Highly recommend it for applications that involve quick iterations with end users and have to be constantly changed and adjusted to user needs.
author: Eric T.

description: As I use Joget, the complexity of installation was removed, also the feature of versioning. Sharing block of form also useful, the mobile interface helps my customer to use the mobile phone to decide the requests.
author: Fadjar T.

description: Joget workflow helped us deliver business critical workflows in record time. The form builder , the datalist, SSO and rest APIs make it a compelling solution. The value proposition is truly unique .
author: Kohinoor B.
Jose R.
pros: I have just sstarted using this product as of 6 weeks ago
cons: I have not used this product long enough to provide an honest assesment of its capabilities
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Joget Workflow Enterprise has Great UI which makes learning easy for the users . As it is web-based we can access this system quickly from anywhere. I will give 5/5 to this product
author: Priyanka B.

review_title: Excellent Software for Rapid App development
description: The best part about the product is I had my workflow along with forms. I did no coding to get this done.
author: Roger H.
